issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
The skill assumes specific tools (k6, wrk, autocannon) are installed, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: wrk-single-endpoint-benchmark
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit one of the required flags; A uses -t4 instead of -t200, B uses -d30s instead of -d60s.

scenarios.name: multi-step-k6-flow
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric by including http_req_duration thresholds and more stages, while Response A lacks the required http_req_duration threshold and uses a different dynamic email pattern.
